title: Paving The Way
description: Adds more path block variants to the game.
body:
Paving the way adds more path block variants to the game for various types of terrarin blocks in the game from dirt and podzol to netherrack and nylium.

The complete list:
- Dirt
- Course Dirt
- Rooted Dirt
- Snowy Dirt & Snow
- Podzol
- Mycelium
- Sand (Red & soul variants)
- Gravel
- Mud
- Packed Mud
- Soul soil
- Netherrack & Nylium variants (Netherrack uses pickaxes for making paths)
